Issues: Lack of unique artistic value for commercial sale.
Generic aesthetic: The composition and style are highly saturated and generalized, lacking a specific conceptual hook or high-end artistic technique that would justify a high price.
Print quality concerns: The image lacks the fine detail and resolution necessary for professional, high-quality printing suitable for resale.
